# ipzilon_subnets (Data Source)

List subnets. Provide id (singular) OR network_id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all subnets in a network
data "ipzilon_subnets" "all" {
  network_id = 1
}

output "subnet_cidrs" {
  value = [for s in data.ipzilon_subnets.all.items : s.cidr]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Lookup a single subnet by ID.
- `network_id` (Number) List all subnets for a network.

### Read-Only

- `items` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `cidr` (String) Subnet CIDR block.
- `description` (String) Free-text description.
- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String) Subnet name.
- `network_id` (Number)
